role: Senior Systems Engineer / Acting Technical Product Owner
bullets: Led systems engineering and software release cycles for the Harrison Open Platform (HOP) — a multi-tenant clinical AI platform delivering AI results for chest X-ray and CT brain/chest studies into hospital radiology workflows.

Owned system-wide functional and non-functional requirements; translated product vision into feature elaborations, acceptance criteria and interface specs for features like Comparison of Priors, Triage, Translations and a 3rd-Party AI Adapter.

Led patient and security risk assessments for SaMD/AI model components (ISO 14971, DCB 0129); served as SME for MDSAP audits, defending Design & Development and Production Controls chapters to maintain ISO 13485 / IEC 62304 compliance.
Release lead across multiple engineering teams: coordinated delivery, managed dependencies, escalated risk, and drove fix/defer calls on production non-conformances.
Defined production metrics and analytics (Grafana, MongoDB, Tableau) to monitor adoption, diagnose issues and close the loop with data-driven configuration tuning.
Drove AI-assisted development adoption: OpenSpec + Claude Code spec-to-code workflows, POCs to de-risk product bets, and mentoring junior systems engineers.
Work Package Manager — scope, schedule, budget, risk and safety — for an obsolescence remediation project on the RAAF Wedgetail flight simulator.
Programmed updates to the Traffic Collision Avoidance System (TCAS) in C, and Python tooling to analyse large volumes of navigational data.
Contributed to the Australian Defence Air Traffic Management System (ADATS): schematic updates and on-site validation testing at a live control tower.
Recognised as requirements management 'Champion', trained at Thales France HQ; led engineering tooling adoption across teams. Nominated for Emerging Talent; received a Business Development award.
Requirements management and verification on the Vigilare air defence command-and-control system, supporting integration of new capability into a deployed RAAF C2 platform.
Resolved trouble reports across Tactical Data Links (Link 11, Link 16, AADSLINK).
Requirements management, verification, and defect root-cause analysis on the Astral life-support ventilator.
Built a C# cabin layout optimiser compliant with FAA regulations (university thesis project).
